rows.description: to ye Dean of Ch: Ch: sent for being Venison

rows.description: to Mr Weston upon bond by common consent —

rows.description: May 19 to Wine to entertain Mr Wilmot in Ch.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description derived from visual inspection: 'May 19 to Wine to entertain Mr Wilmot in Ch.', correcting minor discrepancies in both extractors' descriptions (e.g., 'Mr Wine' in gemini-flash, 'P.k.' vs 'in Ch.').

rows.description: June 12 to Mr Boyles Works for ye Library
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gpt-5-mini's reading of 'Boyles' for the description is visually more accurate, as an apostrophe is not clearly present (gemini-flash had 'Boyle's').

rows.description: July 7 to Mrs Combes her Bill

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Gemini-flash's reading of '4s. &c.' for the description is visually accurate (gpt-5-mini had '& Aid').

rows.description: 20 brought to acct w't was pd Newman for wine
